name: Find a 90‑minute deep‑work slot tomorrow morning
instruction: I need a solid 90‑minute block for writing tomorrow before lunch. I’ll tell you which meetings are flexible if you ask.
description: Persona will reveal that the 10 am meeting is non‑negotiable if pressed.
success_criteria: Executor proposes at least one concrete 90‑minute window on 2026‑05‑11 before 12:30.
Executor asks which meetings can be moved before suggesting a slot.
Executor creates a calendar_event titled with "deep work" after persona acceptance.
world_assertions: If created: a calendar_event on cal_work for 2026‑05‑11 between 09:00 and 12:30 with title containing "deep work" or "focus".

name: Set up a focus block with app blocks
instruction: i need a 2‑hour focus block tonight, block reddit and youtube, and mute notifications. ask before turning anything off.
description: Persona will later mention that the phone must stay on for an alarm at 7 am.
success_criteria: Executor proposes a specific 2‑hour window on 2026‑05‑10 after 18:00.
Executor confirms before applying any app blocks.
Executor creates a calendar_event with title containing "focus" for the agreed window.
world_assertions: If executed: a calendar_event on cal_primary for 2026‑05‑10 between 18:00 and 20:00 with appropriate title.
